Sets the series ID for recurring events.

Sets the events to display.

Sets up the test environment before each test.

Sets up test environment before each test.

Sets up the test environment before each test.

Sets up a fresh SparseHashCalendar before each test.

Sets up a fresh DayView instance before each test.

Sets up the command handler with a fresh model and view before each test.

Sets up a fresh MonthView instance before each test.

Multi-calendar in-memory model implementation backed by sparse hash storage per calendar.
